message:
fix: use AbortController-based timer for inactivity timeout in run loop

Replace passive top-of-loop idleTime check with an active AbortController +
setTimeout that fires after timeout_ms of inactivity. The timer's signal is
combined with the external abort signal via AbortSignal.any(), so hung LLM
calls (never-resolving promises) are now correctly interrupted.

- Create timeoutController + resetInactivityTimer() in runLoop setup
- Combine external signal and timeout signal via AbortSignal.any()
- Set this.signal to combined signal so executeToolCalls inherits it
- Replace lastActivityTime resets with resetInactivityTimer() calls
- Distinguish timeout vs external abort in signal check and planning result
- Clean up timer and restore this.signal after loop exit
